title: Save Change Artifact
description: Studio Save and `PUT` artifact routes must share one pipeline with the CLI: approval guards, optimistic `originalHash`, drift reconciliation, and manifest `updatedAt` bumps. Without a dedicated use case, HTTP handlers would call `saveArtifact` directly and skip invalidation rules agents rely on.
context: Studio Save and `PUT` artifact routes must share one pipeline with the CLI: approval guards, optimistic `originalHash`, drift reconciliation, and manifest `updatedAt` bumps. Without a dedicated use case, HTTP handlers would call `saveArtifact` directly and skip invalidation rules agents rely on.

rules: The use case MUST accept `name`, `filename`, `content`, `originalHash`, `actor`, and optional `force` defaulting to `false`.

rules.requirement: save rejects untracked files and approval-guarded writes
rules: `filename` MUST be tracked on the manifest. When `activeSpecApproval` or `activeSignoff` is set and `force` is false, the use case MUST throw `SaveRequiresForceError` before writing.
When `originalHash` does not match persisted content, the use case MUST throw `ArtifactConflictError` (HTTP 409 at the API boundary).

rules.requirement: successful save resets file state and bumps manifest updatedAt
rules: After write, the saved file MUST be `in-progress`, its validated baseline cleared, drift reconciliation MUST run on other files, and `save(change)` MUST set a new manifest `updatedAt`.

rules.requirement: SaveChangeArtifact returns hash revision and invalidation flag
rules: The result MUST include `{ contentHash, updatedAt, invalidated: boolean }`.

scenarios.name: Save accepts required fields
then: input includes name, filename, content, originalHash, actor

scenarios.name: Guard blocks save without force
